plugins.name: apm
plugins.description: Skills for working with APM — authoring primitives, package lifecycle, marketplaces, dependencies, and security auditing

plugins.name: caveman
plugins.description: Ultra-compressed communication mode. Cuts 65% of output tokens (measured) while keeping full technical accuracy by speaking like a caveman.

plugins.name: rtk
plugins.description: Rust CLI proxy that cuts LLM token consumption 60-90% on common dev commands (git, cargo, npm, docker, kubectl, etc.), with a PATH-wide shim so RTK_ACTIVE reaches child processes.
